author: y4rr
content: Conformance tests added in ferrotorch-jit/tests/conformance_jit_error_variants.rs (Sprint A.4). Both variants were already defined in error.rs but had no test coverage. Added 4 tests for DataDependentControlFlow (Display, From<JitError>, field access, 'static control flow' wording) and 4 tests for RecompilationError (Display, From<JitError>, field access, empty shape). _surface_exclusions.toml updated: reason changed from 'deferred' to 'implicit' with notes pointing at the new test file. Variants will be wired to auto-raise during C7.5 full-graph tracing; Display/From/field API is confirmed stable.
